data.current_description: Calculates distance and duration between one or more origins and destinations. Supports real-time traffic data for driving mode when departure_time is specified.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate distances and travel times between multiple locations
data.description_suggestion: Calculates distance and travel duration between one or more origins and destinations. Supports multiple travel modes (driving, walking, bicycling, transit) with real-time traffic data for driving mode when departure_time is specified. Returns a matrix of distance and duration values for each origin-destination pair, along with status information. Requires valid API key authentication.
